summary: Selected #39365 as the current open canonical path for the remaining system-event wake recipes documentation. Closed refs #39298 and #48869 are historical evidence only. No close, merge, or fix action is safe in this dedupe-only job because #39365 is open and useful but has unresolved review-bot findings and a failing docs check.

actions.reason: Keep #39365 open as the canonical PR. It is useful and narrow, but this dedupe-only job cannot merge or repair it, and it should not be closed because it preserves contributor work and tracks the remaining documentation gap.
